task_completion.description: Open and read the inspection workorder file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_workorder.txt.

task_completion.description: Add a Takeoff waypoint to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl (QGC) mission planner sidebar shows a 'Takeoff' or 'Basic Takeoff' item in the mission list.

task_completion.description: Add a Region of Interest (ROI) waypoint with 25m altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC mission planner shows a 'Region of Interest' (ROI) item. The altitude parameter for this item should be visibly set to 25m.

task_completion.description: Add a Loiter/Orbit waypoint with 30m radius, 50m altitude, and 2 turns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC mission planner shows a 'Loiter', 'Orbit', or 'Circular Flight' item. The parameters should be visibly set to an altitude of 50m, a radius of 30m, and at least 2 turns.

task_completion.description: Add a Return to Launch waypoint at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC mission planner shows a 'Return to Launch' or 'RTL' item at the bottom of the mission list.

task_completion.description: Save the completed mission plan to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in QGC showing the filename 'tower_inspection.plan' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl graphical interface to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGC application open with the map and mission planner active. The agent should not be using terminal scripts (like python or bash) to generate the .plan file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the raw JSON structure of the mission plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) should be shown containing the raw JSON code for a QGC .plan file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QGC map to place the mission items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waypoints (Takeoff, ROI, Orbit, RTL) should be visibly rendered on the map interface within QGC.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workorder is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_workorder.txt. The mission must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tower_inspection.plan. The Region of Interest (ROI) must be set to Latitude -35.3600, Longitude 149.1680, and Altitude 25m. The Loiter Orbit must be set to a radius of 30m, altitude of 50m, and at least 2 turns.
